name: Press Conference
text: Give to the Maria Hill player. Réponse forcée: After the player phase ends, remove 1 all-purpose counter from each support you control. Action d'alter ego: Exhaust your identity → discard this card.

name: Controller
text: [star] Réponse forcée: After Controller activates against you, remove 1 all-purpose counter from a support. If Controlled Innocents is in play, put the top card of your deck into play facedown, engaged with you as a [[Controlled]] minion.

name: Army of the Controlled
text: Une fois révélée: Find the Controlled Innocents environment and put it into play. Une fois déjouée: Discard each [[Controlled]] minion. Place 1 all-purpose counter on a support for each minion discarded this way.

name: Controlled Innocents
text: Each facedown [[Controlled]] minion engaged with a player has a base SCH of 1, a base ATK of 1, and a base hit points of 1. Réponse forcée: After a [[Controlled]] minion is defeated, place that card in its owner's discard pile and place 1 threat on the main scheme.

name: Diabolical Discs
text: Surge. Une fois révélée: Remove 1 all-purpose counter from a support. If Controlled Innocents is in play, put the top card of your deck into play facedown, engaged with you as a [[Controlled]] minion.

name: Discovered
text: Give to the Nick Fury player. Une fois révélée: Change to Assault suit form. If there is no threat on your suit form upgrade, this card gains surge. Otherwise, choose to either take 1 damage for each threat on your suit form upgrade, or remove each threat from your suit form upgrade. In either case, discard this card.

name: Orion
text: Toughness. Orion can have any number of tough status cards. Réponse forcée: After Orion takes any amount of damage, give him a tough status card. (Nick Fury's nemesis minion.)

name: Acquire Infinity Formula
text: Réponse forcée: After Nick Fury takes any amount of damage, give Orion a tough status card. If Orion is not in play, find him and put him into play engaged with the Nick Fury player.

name: Leviathan Soldier
text: Toughness. [star] Réponse forcée: After Leviathan Soldier schemes, deal 1 damage to the engaged player's identity.
flavor: Formerly a secret branch of the KGB, Leviathan has gone independent with their aim of world domination.

name: Cold Storage
text:
Une fois révélée: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Leviathan]] minion and put it into play engaged with you. (Shuffle.) Otherwise, take 2 damage.
[star] Boost: Take 1 damage.

name: Black Widow
text: Interruption forcée: When a character you control attacks Black Widow, remove 1 threat from the main scheme (ignoring any crisis icons in play) → discard the top card of the encounter deck and resolve each "Preparation" ability on that card.

name: Black Widow
text: Une fois révélée: Place 2[per_hero] threat on the main scheme. Interruption forcée: When a character you control attacks Black Widow, remove 1 threat from the main scheme → discard the top card of the encounter deck and resolve each "Preparation" ability on that card.

name: Black Widow
text: Une fois révélée: Place 3[per_hero] threat on the main scheme. Interruption forcée: When a character you control attacks Black Widow, remove 1 threat from the main scheme → discard the top card of the encounter deck and resolve each "Preparation" ability on that card.

name: The Widow's Web
text: Contents: Black Widow (I) and Black Widow (II). (Black Widow (II) and Black Widow (III) instead for expert mode.) Black Widow and Standard encounter sets. Two modular encounter sets (A.I.M. Abduction and A.I.M. Science). Setup: Each player searches the encounter deck for a minion and puts it into play engaged with them. (Shuffle.)

name: The Widow's Web
text: X is Black Widow's stage number. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.
flavor: You track the missing S.H.I.E.L.D. specialist to a decommissioned stretch of subway tunnel and discover her kidnappers' base of operations.

name: Black Widow's Gauntlet
text:
Attack to Black Widow. Black Widow gains retaliate 1. Réponse de héros: After a character you control attacks Black Widow, if no "Preparation" ability was resolved, discard this card (after resolving the retaliate keyword).
Preparation: Attach this card to Black Widow.

name: Grappling Hook
text:
Attack to Black Widow. Interruption forcée: When a player plays an event card, cancel its effects and discard it. Then, discard this card.
Preparation: Discard 1 event card from your hand.

name: Night Vision Goggles
text:
Attack to Black Widow. Each encounter card without a printed "Preparation" ability gains "Preparation: Prevent all damage from this attack. Then, discard Night Vision Goggles."
Preparation: Attach this card to Black Widow.

name: Stun Net
text:
Attach to your identity. Attached character cannot attack. Action de héros: Exhaust a character you control → discard this card. Any player may trigger this ability.
Preparation: After this attack, attach this card to the attacking character.

name: A.I.M. Commando
text:
Quickstrike.
Preparation: After this attack, put this minion into play engaged with you.

name: A.I.M. Grunt
text:
Guard.
Preparation: Put this minion into play engaged with you. Then, resolve this attack against A.I.M. Grunt instead.

name: Automated Defenses
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Each encounter card without a printed "Preparation" ability gains "Preparation: Deal 1 damage to the attacking character."

name: Destroy Evidence
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Each other encounter card gains incite 1. (When revealed, place 1 threat on the main scheme.)

name: Attacrobatics
text:
Une fois révélée: If you are in alter-ego form, change to hero form. Black Widow attacks you. Give her an additional boost card for this attack.
Preparation: Prevent all damage from this attack. In expert mode, deal that much damage to the attacking character.

name: Covert Ops
text:
Une fois révélée: You are confused. Black Widow schemes.
Preparation: Place 1 threat on each scheme.

name: Dance of Death
text:
Une fois révélée: Deal 1 damage to a character you control. Deal 2 damage to a second character you control. Deal 3 damage to a third character you control.
Preparation: Deal 1 damage to each character you control.

name: Widow's Bite
text:
Une fois révélée: You are stunned. Take 1 damage (2 damage instead if you were already stunned).
Preparation: After this attack, stun the attacking character.

name: A.I.M. Abductor
text: Une fois révélée: Tuck the ally you control with the most remaining hit points under Abduct Superhumans. Otherwise, place 2 threat on Abduct Superhumans. If Abduct Superhumans is not in play, find it and put it into play.

name: Abduct Superhumans
text: Surge. Interruption forcée: When an ally leaves play, tuck it under here and place threat here equal to its cost. Then, place 1 acceleration token here. Une fois déjouée: Put each ally tucked here into play under its owner's control.

name: Nabbed!
text: Une fois révélée: If Abduct Superhumans is not in play, find it and put it into play. Discard cards from the top of your deck until an ally is discarded and tuck it under Abduct Superhumans. Place threat equal to that ally's cost and 1 acceleration token on Abduct Superhumans.

name: A.I.M. Scientist
text: Surge. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.) While the engaged player is engaged with another minion, A.I.M. Scientist cannot be attacked.

name: A.I.M. Soldier
text: Patrol. Une fois révélée: Find A.I.M. Scientist and put it into play engaged with you. (If it is already in play, it engages you.) If A.I.M. Scientist did not enter play this way, place 1 threat on the main scheme.

name: Mad Science
text:
Hinder 2[per_hero].
Each [[A.I.M.]] minion gains 1 acceleration icon ([acceleration]).
flavor: Derogatorily referred to as "beekeepers," members of Advanced Idea Mechanics are brilliant but ruthless, seeking world domination through technological power.

name: Batroc
text: [star] Réponse forcée: After Batroc attacks, place 1 threat on Alert Level. Interruption forcée: When Batroc would be defeated, reset his hit points to 8 instead. Then, remove 6 threat from the main scheme.

name: Batroc
text: [star] Réponse forcée: After Batroc attacks, place 1 threat on Alert Level. Interruption forcée: When Batroc would be defeated, reset his hit points to 12 instead. Then, remove 6 threat from the main scheme.

name: Infiltrate A.I.M. Island Embassy
text: Contents: Batroc (A). (Batroc (B) instead for expert mode.) Batroc and Standard encounter sets. Two modular encounter sets (A.I.M. Science and Batrocs's Brigade). Setup: Set each Rescued Captive ally aside. Put the Alert Level environment into play, [[Low]] side faceup. In expert mode, place 2[per_hero] threat on Alert Level.

name: Infiltrate A.I.M. Island Embassy
text: Interruption forcée: When the last threat is removed from this scheme, advance to stage 2A (the players win by advancing). If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.
flavor: You sneak into the A.I.M. island embassy in search of the abducted S.H.I.E.L.D. specialist Sarah Garza. There you come face to face with the mercenary known as Batroc the Leaper.

name: Locate Missing Person
flavor: Now that you've penetrated the embassy, you need to locate Garza. You discover several holding cells in the embassy's basement. Hopefully one of them holds the kidnapped tech.

name: Locate Missing Person
text: Interruption forcée: When the last threat is removed from this scheme, put 1 set-aside Rescued Captive ally into play exhausted under any player's control. The players may advance to stage 3A. If they do not advance, place 3[per_hero] threat here. (The players win by advancing, but will need at least 1 Rescued Captive to survive.) If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: Extract Captives
text: Une fois révélée: If the Alert Level is on its [[High]] side, deal each player 1 facedown encounter card. Otherwise, remove all threat from Alert Level and flip it to its [[High]] side. In either case, in expert mode, place 2[per_hero] threat on Alert Level.
flavor: You didn't find Garza, but you did find several other civilian prisoners. You must get them out safely.

name: Extract Captives
text: In expert mode, each minion gains quickstrike. Interruption forcée: When an enemy attacks, it attacks a Rescued Captive instead. If there is no threat here, the players win the game. If this stage is completed or there are no Rescued Captive allies in play, the players lose the game.

name: Alert Level
text: If there is at least 4[per_hero] threat here, remove all threat from here and flip this card. Réponse forcée: After a character is defeated except by consequential damage, place 1 threat here. Action de héros: Spend 1 resource of any type → remove 1 threat from here.

name: Alert Level
text: Batroc gets +1 SCH and +1 ATK. If there is at least 4[per_hero] threat here, the players lose the game. Réponse forcée: After a character is defeated except by consequential damage, place 1 threat here. Action de héros: Spend 1 resource of any type → remove 1 threat from here.

name: Rescued Captive
text: Victory -1. Does not count against your ally limit. Card abilities cannot remove this ally from play. Action de héros: Exhaust Rescued Captive → remove 1[per_hero] threat from the main scheme.

name: Heightened Reflexes
text:
Attach to Batroc. Uses (4 leap counters). Interruption forcée: When Batroc would take any amount of damage, prevent 2 of that damage and remove 1 leap counter from here.
[star] Boost: Attach this card to Batroc.

name: Embassy Guard
text: Guard. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.) If Alert Level is on its [[High]] side, this card gains surge. Une fois déjouée: Place 1 threat on Alert Level.

name: Embassy Patrol
text: Patrol. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.) If Alert Level is on its [[High]] side, this card gains incite 1. Une fois déjouée: Place 1 threat on Alert Level.

name: Commandeer Security Office
text: Une fois révélée: If Alert Level is on its [[High]] side, place 1 acceleration token here. Une fois déjouée: Remove 1[per_hero] threat from Alert Level.

name: Leaping Kick
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Batroc schemes. When Revealed (Hero): Batroc attacks the ally with the most remaining hit points. This attack gains overkill. If there were no allies in play, Batroc attacks you.

name: Security Cameras
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Remove 1 threat from Alert Level. This card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): For each character you control, choose to either exhaust that character or place 1 threat on Alert Level (2 threat instead if Alert Level is on its [[High]] side).

name: Machete
text: Surge. Vulnerable. [star] Machete's attacks gain piercing. Une fois déjouée: Shuffle Machete into the encounter deck.
flavor: With each Machete's demise, the title passes to another member of the Lopez family.

name: Rapido
text:
[star] Rapido's attacks gain ranged and deal indirect damage. Une fois révélée: Deal 1 damage to each character you control.
[star] Boost: Deal 1 damage to each character you control.

name: Zaran
text: [star] Zaran gets +X ATK, where X is the printed resource cost of the card tucked under him. Une fois révélée: Tuck a [[Weapon]] upgrade you control under Zaran. Otherwise, tuck the top card of your deck under Zaran.

name: Batroc's Brigade
text: Each minion gains toughness. Une fois révélée: Give each enemy a tough status card. Interruption de héros: When you reveal a non-[[Elite]] minion, spend 3 resources of any type → cancel the effects of that minion and discard it.
flavor: "Money won't buy loyalty, but it helps" —Batroc

name: Soldiers of Fortune
text:
Une fois révélée: Choose: • Spend 3 resources of any type. • Find a [[Mercenary]] minion and reveal it. If no minion entered play this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Choose: Either spend 1 resource of any type, or this card gains [boost][boost][boost].

name: M.O.D.O.K.
text: Retaliate 1. Interruption forcée: When M.O.D.O.K. would be defeated, if a Holding Cell is in play, remove 2 lock counters from it and reset M.O.D.O.K.'s hit points to 10 instead. Otherwise, the players win the game.

name: M.O.D.O.K.
text: Retaliate 2. Steady. Interruption forcée: When M.O.D.O.K. would be defeated, if a Holding Cell is in play, remove 2 lock counters from it and reset M.O.D.O.K.'s hit points to 14 instead. Otherwise, the players win the game.

name: Upgrading Adaptoids
text: Contents: M.O.D.O.K. (A). (M.O.D.O.K. (B) instead for expert mode.) M.O.D.O.K. and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (Scientist Supreme). Setup: Create the Holding Cell deck (see rulebook p. 13). Put 1 random [[Adaptoid]] environment into play (2 environments instead in expert mode) and set the others aside. Each player searches the encounter deck for a copy of Adaptoid and reveals it.

name: Upgrading Adaptoids
text: Interruption forcée: When this stage would be completed, put 1 random set-aside [[Adaptoid]] environment into play instead. Then, if there are no set-aside [[Adaptoid]] environments, the players lose the game. Otherwise, remove all threat from here and shuffle each Adaptoid minion from the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.

name: Holding Cell
text: Enters play with 2[per_hero] lock counters on it. Interruption forcée: When the last lock counter is removed from here, flip this card and put Flying Inhuman into play under any player's control. Action de héros: Spend [energy] [energy] resources or 3 resources of any type → remove 1 lock counter from here.

name: Flying Inhuman
text: Does not count against your ally limit. [star] Réponse: After this ally thwarts, remove 1 threat from another scheme. Réponse forcée: After this card leaves play, flip it and place it on the bottom of the Holding Cell deck.

name: Holding Cell
text: Enters play with 2[per_hero] lock counters on it. Interruption forcée: When the last lock counter is removed from here, flip this card and put Psionic Inhuman into play under any player's control. Action de héros: Spend [mental] [mental] resources or 3 resources of any type → remove 1 lock counter from here.

name: Psionic Inhuman
text: Does not count against your ally limit. [star] Réponse: After this ally thwarts, remove 1 lock counter from a Holding Cell. Réponse forcée: After this card leaves play, flip it and place it on the bottom of the Holding Cell deck.

name: Holding Cell
text: Enters play with 2[per_hero] lock counters on it. Interruption forcée: When the last lock counter is removed from here, flip this card and put Sarah Garza into play under any player's control. Action de héros: Spend a [wild] resource or 3 resources of any type → remove 1 lock counter from here.

name: Sarah Garza
text: Does not count against your ally limit. [star] Sarah Garza's attacks gain overkill and ranged. Réponse forcée: After this card leaves play, flip it and place it on the bottom of the Holding Cell deck.

name: Holding Cell
text: Enters play with 2[per_hero] lock counters on it. Interruption forcée: When the last lock counter is removed from here, flip this card and put Strong Inhuman into play under any player's control. Action de héros: Spend [physical] [physical] resources or 3 resources of any type → remove 1 lock counter from here.

name: Strong Inhuman
text: Toughness. Does not count against your ally limit. Interruption forcée: After this card leaves play, flip it and place it on the bottom of the Holding Cell deck.

name: Flying Upgrade
text: Each Adaptoid gets +1 SCH, gains incite 1, and gains the [[Aerial]] trait.
flavor:
"They fly now?"
"They fly now."
—Maria Hill and Nick Fury

name: Psionic Upgrade
text: Each Adaptoid gains villainous and the [[Psionic]] trait.
flavor: "Remember your psionic defense training!" —Maria Hill

name: Sarah Garza Upgrade
text:
Each Adaptoid gains the [[Elite]] trait.
Each Adaptoid gets +1 ATK and its attacks gain overkill and ranged.
flavor: "Well, that's just great. These things can control my powers better than I can!" —Sarah Garza

name: Strong Upgrade
text: Each Adaptoid gets +1 ATK, gains toughness, and gains the [[Brute]] trait.
flavor: "I don't think we'd like her when she's angry!" —Quake

name: Adaptoid
text:
[star] (Check [[Adaptoid]] environments for modifiers to these values.) Une fois déjouée: Remove 1 all-purpose counter from an environment.
[star] Boost: After this activation, shuffle Adaptoid into the encounter deck.

name: Automated Mobile Unit
text: Attach to M.O.D.O.K. M.O.D.O.K. gets +5 hit points. Réponse forcée: After M.O.D.O.K.'s hit points are reset, discard this card.
flavor: "I will crush you like a bug!" —M.O.D.O.K.

name: Focusing Crystal
text: Attach to M.O.D.O.K. Réponse forcée: After M.O.D.O.K.'s hit points are reset, discard this card.
flavor: M.O.D.O.K. channels his psionic powers through the crystal on his giant forehead.

name: Nanobots
text: Attach to M.O.D.O.K. [star] Réponse forcée: After M.O.D.O.K. activates, heal 1 damage from him. Réponse forcée: After M.O.D.O.K.'s hit points are reset, discard this card.
flavor: Microscopic machines keep the Doomsday Chair in working order.

name: Psionic Force Field
text:
Attach to M.O.D.O.K. Attached enemy gains stalwart. Interruption forcée: When attached enemy would take any amount of damage, place it here instead. Then, if there is at least 5 damage here, discard this card.
[star] Boost: Attach this card to the activating enemy.

name: Psionic Machetes
text:
Attach to M.O.D.O.K. [star] M.O.D.O.K.'s attacks gain piercing. Réponse forcée: After M.O.D.O.K.'s hit points are reset, discard this card.
[star] Boost: If this activation is an attack, it gains piercing.

name: Reverse Engineering
text: Attach to M.O.D.O.K. [star] X is equal to the printed cost of the card tucked here. Une fois révélée: Tuck an upgrade you control under here. Otherwise, tuck the top card of your deck under here. Réponse forcée: After M.O.D.O.K.'s hit points are reset, discard this card.

name: A.I.M. Jailer
text: Guard. Une fois révélée: A.I.M. Jailer attacks the [[Rescued]] ally with the fewest remaining hit points. Otherwise, place 1 lock counter on a Holding Cell.

name: Hostage Situation
text: M.O.D.O.K. cannot take damage. Une fois révélée: Attach 1 [[Rescued]] ally faceup here. Attached ally is under no player's control. (Attached ally is still in play.) Une fois déjouée: The defeating player takes control of attached ally.

name: Psionic Enhancement
text:
Hinder 1[per_hero].
[star] Boost: Give the activating enemy an additional boost card.

name: "It's Alive!"
text: Une fois révélée: Each player searches the encounter deck and discard pile for an [[Adaptoid]] minion and reveals it. (Shuffle.) Deal each player who did not engage a minion this way a facedown encounter card.

name: Psionic Blast
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): You are confused. M.O.D.O.K. schemes. When Revealed (Hero): Take X indirect damage, where X is M.O.D.O.K.'s SCH. Confuse each character that takes damage this way.

name: Scientist Supreme
text: Victory -1. Villainous. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.) [star] Scientist Supreme's attacks gain piercing and ranged.
flavor: Equipped with a high-tech suit, the Scientist Supreme wields great power, both physical and political.

name: Monica Rappaccini
text: Victory -1. Villainous. Vulnerable. (Discard this character if it is stunned or confused.) While Scientist Supreme is in the victory display, Monica Rappaccini gains villainous.
flavor: As second-in-command of A.I.M., Monica has her sights set on the title of Scientist Supreme.

name: Diplomatic Immunity
text: Une fois révélée: Place 1 acceleration token here for each [[A.I.M.]] minion in the victory display.
flavor: Attacking the leader of a sovereign nation is politically fraught. You will have to handle the Scientist Supreme delicately.

name: Diplomatic Sanctions
text:
Surge. Une fois révélée: Discard 1 card from your hand for each [[A.I.M.]] minion in the victory display.
[star] Boost: This card gains [boost] for each [[A.I.M.]] minion in the victory display.

name: Citizen V
text: Citizen V cannot be defeated unless there are at least 1[per_hero] [[Thunderbolt]] minions in the victory display. [star] Interruption forcée: When Citizen V would activate against you during step two of the villain phase, if you are engaged with a [[Thunderbolt]] minion, Citizen V does not activate and heals 4 damage instead.

name: Citizen V
text: Citizen V cannot be defeated unless there are at least 1[per_hero] [[Thunderbolt]] minions in the victory display. [star] Interruption forcée: When Citizen V would activate against you during step two of the villain phase, if you are engaged with a [[Thunderbolt]] minion, Citizen V does not activate and heals 6 damage instead.

name: Apprehending Rogue Agents
text: Contents: Citizen V (A). (Citizen V (B) instead for expert mode.) Thunderbolts and Standard encounter sets. Setup: Choose 1 modular set, plus 1[per_hero] additional modular sets, each with an [[Elite]], [[Thunderbolt]] minion. Set each of those minions aside and shuffle the rest of their encounter sets into the encounter deck. Reveal the Justice, Like Lightning environment.

name: Apprehending Rogue Agents
text: Each [[Thunderbolt]] minion gains guard. Réponse forcée: After a player attacks a [[Thunderbolt]] minion, that minion engages that player. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.
flavor: "We can do this the easy way, or the fun way." —Citizen V

name: Justice, Like Lightning
text: Une fois révélée: Each player reveals a random set-aside [[Thunderbolt]] minion. Reveal and attach the remaining set-aside [[Thunderbolt]] minion faceup here. In expert mode, give each of these minions a tough status card. Flip this card.
flavor:
"Justice, like lightning, ever should appear;
To few men ruin, but to all men fear." —Thomas Randolph

name: Thunderbolt Backup
text: (The minion attached here is in play and can be targeted by attacks and abilities.) Interruption forcée: When the round ends, attach the [[Thunderbolt]] minion with the most damage here, swapping it with the minion already attached here, if any. Heal 1[per_hero] damage from attached minion. In expert mode, heal 1[per_hero] additional damage from that minion and give it a tough status card.

name: Citizen V's Sword
text: Une fois révélée: Attach to Citizen V. He activates against you. Réponse de héros: After you attack and damage Citizen V, spend [physical] [physical] resources → discard this card.

name: Jolt
text: Villainous. Une fois déjouée: Place 3 threat on the main scheme. Action de héros: Exhaust your hero → place 1 parley counter on Jolt. If there are 3 or more parley counters here, remove Jolt from the game. (She is not defeated.)

name: Innocent Bystanders
text: Uses (4 bystander counters). Réponse forcée: After you attack an enemy or an enemy attacks you, either spend 1 resource of any type or place 1 threat on the main scheme (2 threat instead in expert mode). Remove 1 bystander counter from here.

name: The Coming Storm
text: Une fois révélée: Each player engages each minion engaged with the player clockwise from them.
flavor: "Thunderbolts, let's bring these vigilantes to justice!" —Songbird

name: Rumbling Thunder
text: Une fois révélée: Each player engages each minion engaged with the player clockwise from them.

name: Down but Not Out
text: Une fois révélée: Choose a random [[Thunderbolt]] minion from the victory display and reveal it. Place damage on that minion until it has 5 hit points remaining. Then, remove this card from the game. If no minion entered play this way, this card gains surge.

name: Tap In
text: Une fois révélée: Engage the [[Thunderbolt]] minion with the least damage that is not engaged with you. That minion activates against you. If no minion activated this way, Citizen V activates against you.
flavor: "Don't worry, Batroc. I got this." —Moonstone

name: Moonstone
text: Villainous. Victory 1. [star] Réponse forcée: After Moonstone activates, give her a tough status card.
flavor: "Catch!"

name: Rule the Skies
text:
Each [[Aerial]] character gets +1 ATK.
[star] Boost: If the activating enemy has the [[Aerial]] trait, give it an additional boost card.

name: Gravitational Pull
text:
Une fois révélée: Find Moonstone and reveal her. (If she is already in play, she engages you.) Moonstone activates against you. If no enemy activated this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Exhaust a character you control.

name: Psychological Manipulation
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Discard an ally or support you control. Otherwise, this card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Deal X damage to the friendly character with the fewest remaining hit points, where X is equal to your hero's ATK.

name: Songbird
text: Villainous. Victory 1. [star] Interruption forcée: When Songbird activates, give her 1 additional boost card for this activation.
flavor: "Time to face the music!"

name: Solid Sound Constructs
text: Attach to Songbird. Otherwise, attach to the villain. Attached enemy loses stalwart. Interruption forcée: When attached enemy would gain a confused or stunned status card, discard this card instead.

name: Hard Sound Bindings
text:
Attach to your identity. Interruption forcée: When you would attack, discard Hard Sound Bindings instead. Then, you are stunned.
[star] Boost: You are stunned. If you were already stunned, give the activating enemy an additional boost card.

name: Sonic Bubble
text: Interruption forcée: When any amount of damage would be dealt to an enemy, remove an equal amount of threat from here instead.
flavor: "Can't touch this!" —Songbird

name: Hard Sound
text:
Une fois révélée: Find Songbird and reveal her. (If she is already in play, she engages you.) Songbird activates against you. If no enemy activated this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Give the activating enemy an additional boost card.

name: Black Widow
text: Retaliate 1. Villainous. Victory 1. [star] Réponse forcée: After Black Widow schemes against you, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a copy of Handspring and attach it to her. (Shuffle.) Otherwise, you are confused.

name: Handspring
text: Attach to Black Widow. Otherwise, attach to the villain. Interruption forcée: When attached enemy would take damage from an attack, deal that damage to the attacking character instead. Discard this card.
flavor: "This has been fun." —Black Widow

name: Pride of the Red Room
text: Une fois révélée: Place 1 additional threat here for each [[Preparation]] card in play.
flavor: After dominating her cohort in the Red Room, Yelena Belova set out to prove herself the greatest Black Widow.

name: Pale Little Spider
text:
Une fois révélée: Find Black Widow and reveal her. (If she is already in play, she engages you.) Black Widow activates against you. If no enemy activated this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: You are confused. If you were already confused, place 1 threat on the main scheme.

name: Radioactive Man
text: Villainous. Victory 1. [star] Réponse forcée: After Radioactive Man activates against you, deal 1 damage to each character you control.
flavor: "Up and at them!"

name: Radiation Exposure
text: Attach to your identity. [star] If attached identity has the [[Gamma]] trait, this attachment gives +1 ATK instead. Réponse forcée: After you recover, discard 1 card from your hand → discard this card.

name: Runaway Nuclear Reaction
text: Réponse forcée: After Radioactive Man is dealt any amount of damage, place an equal amount of threat here. Then, if there is 10 or more threat here, deal 10 damage to each character and discard Runaway Nuclear Reaction.

name: Power of the Atom
text:
Une fois révélée: Find Radioactive Man and reveal him. (If he is already in play, he engages you.) Radioactive Man activates against you. If no enemy activated this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Take 2 indirect damage.

name: MACH-IV
text:
Villainous. Victory 1.
[star] Each character without the [[Aerial]] trait cannot make basic defenses against MACH-IV's attacks.
flavor: "I've got all the weaponry of a fighter jet—and then some."

name: Blasters
text: Attach to MACH-IV. Otherwise, attach to the enemy with the highest ATK. [star] Attached enemy's attacks gain overkill and ranged. Réponse de héros: After you attack and damage attached enemy, spend [energy] [energy] resources → discard this card.

name: Heat-Seeking Missiles
text: Attach to MACH-IV. Otherwise, attach to the villain. Uses (4 missile counters). [star] Réponse forcée: After attached enemy attacks you, remove 1 missile counter from here and take 2 indirect damage.

name: Aerial Dogfight
text:
Hinder 2[per_hero].
Reduce the damage each [[Aerial]] character takes from each attack by 2 unless the attacker or attack has the [[Aerial]] trait, or the attack has ranged.

name: Supersonic
text:
Une fois révélée: Find MACH-IV and reveal him. (If he is already in play, he engages you.) MACH-IV activates against you. If no enemy activated this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: If this activation is an attack, it gains overkill and ranged.

name: Batroc
text: Villainous. Victory 1. Interruption forcée: When Batroc engages you, discard 1 card from your hand.
flavor: "On se revoit. En garde!"

name: Coup de Foudre
text: Interruption forcée: When a minion engages a player, that player discards the top X cards of their deck, where X is the number of boost icons ([boost]) on that minion. Place 1 threat here for each printed [energy] resource discarded this way.

name: Batroc the Leaper
text:
Une fois révélée: Find Batroc and reveal him. (If he is already in play, he engages you.) Batroc activates against you. If no enemy activated this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Discard 1 card from your hand.

name: Parcours du Combattant
text:
Surge. Une fois révélée: Each player engages each minion engaged with the player clockwise from them.
[star] Boost: After this attack resolves, engage a minion in play that is not engaged with you.

name: Baron Zemo
text: Interruption forcée: When Baron Zemo would be defeated, reset his hit points to 12 instead. Remove 3 secret counters from among [[Board Member]] environments.
flavor: "Arrest them by order of the Executive Board!"

name: Baron Zemo
text: [star] Interruption forcée: When Baron Zemo activates against you, either place 1 secret counter on a [[Board Member]] card or give Baron Zemo an additional boost card for this activation.

name: Baron Zemo
text: Interruption forcée: When Baron Zemo would be defeated, reset his hit points to 16 instead. Remove 3 secret counters from among [[Board Member]] environments.
flavor: "Arrest them by order of the Executive Board!"

name: Baron Zemo
text: Steady. [star] Interruption forcée: When Baron Zemo activates against you, either place 2 secret counters on a [[Board Member]] card or give Baron Zemo an additional boost card for this activation.

name: Zemo's Manipulations
text: Contents: Baron Zemo (A1). (Baron Zemo (B1) instead for expert mode.) Baron Zemo, S.H.I.E.L.D. Executive Board, Executive Board Evidence, and Standard encounter sets. Two modular encounter sets (Scientist Supreme and S.H.I.E.L.D.). Setup: Prepare the evidence (see rulebook p. 18). Put each [[Board Member]] environment into play. If not playing campaign mode, place 2 secret counters on each [[Board Member]] environment.

name: Zemo's Manipulations
text: Réponse: After the player phase ends, the first player may place 2 secret counters on a [[Board Member]] environment that has no secret counters on it to gain 2 cards from the S.H.I.E.L.D. envelope (1 card instead in campaign mode). The players may advance to stage 2A to make their accusation. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: The Accusation
text: Une fois révélée: Make an accusation by guessing a means, a motive, and an opportunity, along with the board member associated with that combination in the campaign log. This board member is the accused. (See "The Accusation" on p. 19 of the rulebook.)
flavor: You've gathered all the evidence you can. All that remains is to make your accusation.

name: The Accusation
text: Une fois révélée: Do the following: 1. Use the cards in the A.I.M. envelope to identify the mole. 2. For each guess you got wrong, place 1 secret counter on each [[Board Member]] card. 3. If you accused the wrong board member, place 3 secret counters on the accused. 4. Advance to stage 3A.

name: Fighting Zemo
text: Une fois révélée: Flip Baron Zemo to his [[Unmasked]] side and reset his hit points to his printed hit point value. Find Baron Zemo's Sword and attach it to him.
flavor: You unmask Zemo's deception and expose his associate's identity.

name: Fighting Zemo
text: Une fois révélée: Flip the mole to its attachment side and attach it to Baron Zemo. Place 1[per_hero] threat here for each secret counter on each [[Board Member]] attachment. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.
flavor: Bring Baron Zemo and his accomplice to justice!

name: Baron Zemo's Sword
text: Attach to Baron Zemo. [star] Réponse forcée: After Baron Zemo attacks and defeats a character, place 1 secret counter on the [[Board Member]] environment with the fewest secret counters. Action de héros: Spend [physical] [physical] [physical] or [energy] [energy] [energy] resources → remove 1 secret counter from a [[Board Member]] environment and discard this card.

name: Reluctant Foe
text: Treat attached hero as an [[Elite]] minion with SCH equal to its printed THW. Replace its printed text box with: "Villainous. Une fois déjouée: Remove this hero and Reluctant Foe from the game." Une fois révélée: Search your collection for a hero whose title does not match a character in play and put it into play engaged with you. Attach this card to it.

name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Agent
text: Quickstrike. Vulnerable. [star] Interruption forcée: When S.H.I.E.L.D. Agent activates or is defeated, add 1 secret counter to the [[Board Member]] environment with the fewest secret counters.

name: Divided Loyalties
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. As an additional cost for a player to attack, thwart, or defend with an ally, that player must spend 1 resource of any type. Une fois déjouée: Remove 1[per_hero] secret counters from among [[Board Member]] environments.

name: Undermine Support
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. As an additional cost for a player to ready a support, that player must spend 1 resource of any type. Une fois déjouée: Remove 1[per_hero] secret counters from among [[Board Member]] environments.
flavor: "S.H.I.E.L.D. takes orders from me now!" —Baron Zemo

name: Battle of Wits
text: Une fois révélée: Baron Zemo schemes. If this activation would place any threat on the main scheme, you may spend X [mental] resources to prevent X of that threat and remove X secret counters from among [[Board Member]] environments.

name: Might Makes Right
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Place 2 secret counters on the [[Board Member]] environment with the fewest secret counters. When Revealed (Hero): Baron Zemo attacks you. If no character takes damage from this attack, remove 3 secret counters from among [[Board Member]] environments.

name: The Ends Justify the Means
text: Une fois révélée: Choose: • Baron Zemo defeats the minion with the fewest remaining hit points. Baron Zemo schemes. • Discard an ally or support you control → remove secret counters from among [[Board Member]] environments equal to the discarded card's printed resource cost.

name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Trooper
text: Patrol. Vulnerable. Une fois déjouée: The engaged player discards 1 [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] ally or support they control. Otherwise, place 2 threat on the main scheme.
flavor: "Just come peacefully and no one gets hurt."

name: Arrest Warrant
text: Action d'alter ego: Exhaust your identity or 1 [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] card you control → search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] minion and reveal it. (Shuffle.) Discard this card.

name: Disavowed
text: Increase the resource cost to play each [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] card by 1. Une fois révélée: Place 1 threat here for each [[S.H.I.E.L.D.]] card in play.
flavor: The S.H.I.E.L.D. Executive Board has disavowed all knowledge of your activities and cut off your resources.

name: Chief Medical Officer
text: Setup. If there are 4 or more secret counters here (3 or more instead in expert mode), flip this card. Action de héros: Spend [energy] [energy] resources → remove 1 secret counter from here. Then, heal 1 damage from a friendly character.

name: Medical Officer's Aid
text: Attach to the villain. Permanent. Réponse forcée: After a secret counter is placed here, either heal 2 damage from the villain or deal 1 damage to the friendly character with the fewest remaining hit points. If there are 3 [[Board Member]] attachments in play, the players lose the game.

name: Chief Surveillance Officer
text: Setup. If there are 4 or more secret counters here (3 or more instead in expert mode), flip this card. Action de héros: Spend [mental] [mental] resources → remove 1 secret counter from here. Then, remove 2 threat from a scheme.

name: Surveillance Officer's Aid
text: Attach to the villain. Permanent. Réponse forcée: After a secret counter is placed here, place 2 threat on the main scheme. If there are 3 [[Board Member]] attachments in play, the players lose the game.

name: Chief Tactical Officer
text: Setup. If there are 4 or more secret counters here (3 or more instead in expert mode), flip this card. Action de héros: Spend [physical] [physical] resources → remove 1 secret counter from here. Then, deal 2 damage to an enemy.

name: Tactical Officer's Aid
text: Attach to the villain. Permanent. Réponse forcée: After a secret counter is placed here, deal 2 damage to a friendly character. If there are 3 [[Board Member]] attachments in play, the players lose the game.

name: A.I.M. Interference ([energy])
text:
Incite 1. Une fois révélée: Place 1 secret counter on each [[Board Member]] card. You may spend X [energy] resources to prevent X of these counters from being placed.
[star] Boost: Resolve this card's "When Revealed" ability.

name: A.I.M. Interference ([mental])
text:
Incite 1. Une fois révélée: Place 1 secret counter on each [[Board Member]] card. You may spend X [mental] resources to prevent X of these counters from being placed.
[star] Boost: Resolve this card's "When Revealed" ability.

name: A.I.M. Interference ([physical])
text:
Incite 1. Une fois révélée: Place 1 secret counter on each [[Board Member]] card. You may spend X [physical] resources to prevent X of these counters from being placed.
[star] Boost: Resolve this card's "When Revealed" ability.

name: Medical Records
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Protection ally and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for a Protection ally and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Wiretap
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Justice ally and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for a Justice ally and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Security Scanner
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Aggression ally and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for an Aggression ally and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Money
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Protection upgrade and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for a Protection upgrade and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Blackmail
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Justice upgrade and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for a Justice upgrade and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Ideology
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Aggression upgrade and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for an Aggression upgrade and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Security Clearance
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Protection support and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for a Protection support and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Travel
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Justice support and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for a Justice support and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Authority
text: Setup: Each player may add 1 secret counter to a [[Board Member]] environment to search their collection for a different Aggresion support and shuffle it into their deck. Each player may add 1 threat to the main scheme to search their deck for an Aggresion support and add it to their hand. (Shuffle.)
